chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory When an Animal Strikes a Person with Its Front or Hind Legs

text: 5351 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ : "أَنَّ عَلِيّاً عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ كَانَ يُضَمِّنُ اَلْقَائِدَ وَ اَلسَّائِقَ وَ اَلرَّاكِبَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5351 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni:
"Indeed, Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) used to hold the one leading (the animal), the one driving (the animal), and the rider accountable."
